title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Backend Developer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!
